prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the **EA888 Gen3 (CJXB/CJXC)** engine with **Garrett GTX3071R Gen II** turbocharger (hybrid core, 62mm billet compressor wheel, 9-blade turbine, 0.82 A/R housing), paired with **APR High-Flow Carbon Fiber Intake System** and **034 Motorsport High-Pressure Fuel Pump** (350 LPH) to support 450+ WHP on **E85 blend** (targeting 28-30 PSI boost with **APR Silicone Charge Pipes** and **TurboSmart 45mm Kompact Dual-Port BOV**).

**Bilstein B16 PSS10 Coilovers** with **H&R 25mm Front / 20mm Rear Anti-Roll Bars** and **034 Motorsport Density Line Subframe Collar Kit** to eliminate subframe deflection, paired with **Whiteline Adjustable Rear Toe Arms** (for aggressive mid-corner rotation) and **Neuspeed Power-Brake Big Brake Kit** (356mm 2-piece rotors, 6-piston calipers, Ferodo DS2500 pads).

**Unitronic Downpipe with 3.5" Catted Section** (200-cell metallic core) and **Milltek Sport 3.5" Cat-Back Exhaust** (resonated, non-valved for aggressive 3,000-5,000 RPM tone), combined with **Integrated Engineering PCV Delete Kit** (AN-6 fittings, -10 lines) and **CTS Turbo High-Flow Intercooler** (1,250 CFM core, 3.5" inlet/outlet) to maintain IATs below 10°C over ambient at 30 PSI.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 Widebody Kit** (MK7-spec, 30mm front/25mm rear fender flares, carbon fiber front splitter, and duckbill rear wing) with **APR Carbon Fiber Side Skirts** and **VMR V710 19x9.5 ET35 Wheels** (staggered, 235/35 R19 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, 5x112 PCD, +35mm spacers for flush fitment).

**OEM+ Euro-spec LED Headlights** (Hella Dynamic Curve, sequential turn signals) with **Morimoto XB LED Fog Lights** and **Vland Sequential LED Tail Lights** (VW-specific, DRL-integrated), paired with **3M Matte Graphite Black Vinyl Wrap** (Xpel Stealth finish) and **OEM VW Lapiz Blue Lower Accent Paint** (mirror caps, rear diffuser).

**Recaro Sportster CS II Seats** (VW-specific mounting brackets, Schroth Profi II 4-point harnesses) with **Custom Alcantara Door Cards** (red stitching, OEM Golf R door pulls) and **Momo Mod.78 Steering Wheel** (320mm, suede, VW-specific airbag adapter, quick-release hub).
